name: Tokyo Ichiban Foods Co., Ltd.
summary: Tokyo Ichiban Foods Co., Ltd. operates a chain of swimming tiger blowfish specialty restaurants under the Tora-fugu Tei name in Japan. It also operates sushi and live fishes restaurant under the Sakana-no-manma name; and tiger blowfish restaurant under the Fuguyoshi Souhonten name, as well as operates restaurants under the Wokuni name. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
